coverage_note: The bundled IL8 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from IL8 IgE receptor biology, mast-cell and eosinophil activation, cytokine and chemokine signaling, NF-kappaB control, and JAK-STAT inflammatory regulation and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000169429: IL8 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: IL8 findings should be read against IgE receptor biology, mast-cell and eosinophil activation, cytokine and chemokine signaling, NF-kappaB control, and JAK-STAT inflammatory regulation; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

IL8 immune-response variation model is curated as a IL8 marker for Allergy, asthma, atopy, and inflammatory disease context, Mast-cell, eosinophil, cytokine, and chemokine pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

IL8 regulatory expression context model is curated as a IL8 marker for Allergy, asthma, atopy, and inflammatory disease context, Mast-cell, eosinophil, cytokine, and chemokine pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
